text: Cessna Three Four Five, taxi to runway two seven via Alpha, hold short of runway three three.
Skyhawk Two One Tango, runway one six left, cleared for takeoff, fly runway heading.
Bonanza Five Sierra, radar contact, descend and maintain four thousand five hundred, fly heading zero niner zero.
Archer Niner Mike, traffic two o'clock, three miles, opposite direction, a Cessna at three thousand.
November Four Five X-ray, contact Seattle Center one three two point four five.
Cessna Three Four Five, cleared to the Reno airport via radar vectors, climb and maintain six thousand, squawk four two one seven.
Cherokee Eight Bravo, make right traffic, runway three four, report midfield downwind.
Mooney Four Charlie, you are cleared for the ILS runway one six right approach, maintain two thousand until established.
Skylane Seven Quebec, give way to the company Boeing on your left, then continue taxi via Bravo.
Cessna Three Four Five, line up and wait runway two seven, traffic landing runway three three.
Bonanza Five Sierra, reduce speed to one one zero knots, expect the visual approach runway two five.
Citation Two Two Lima, cross the COSTR intersection at or above one one thousand, mach point seven four.
Archer Niner Mike, wind two seven zero at one five, gust two two, runway two seven, cleared to land.
Cessna Three Four Five, radar contact, turn left heading one eight zero, resume own navigation.
Piper Six Tango, taxi to the ramp via Charlie and Delta, monitor ground point niner.
Skyhawk Two One Tango, go around, traffic on the runway, climb and maintain three thousand, fly runway heading.
